signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY (Up from 2.0%, Below 2.3-2.4% Consensus)** | YES | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

South Korea's official CPI data, released today by the Ministry of Data and Statistics, shows annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in February, driven by oil prices but tempered by government fuel caps and food vouchers; monthly CPI rose 0.3% v
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Solana's Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade** was confirmed as of April 14, 2026, with the network achieving an all-time record
signals.raw: Solana's Alpenglow Consensus Upgrade** was confirmed as of April 14, 2026, with the network achieving an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions.[5] The upgrade is designed to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to just 150 milliseconds, representing a major technical breakthrough.[5]
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET

signals.headline: XRP Expanding DeFi Footprint** across Solana, Ethereum, Optimism, and Hyper EVM via Hex Trust has been announced, with b
signals.raw: XRP Expanding DeFi Footprint** across Solana, Ethereum, Optimism, and Hyper EVM via Hex Trust has been announced, with both ecosystems publicly signaling support on X.[6] This cross-chain integration signals growing institutional collaboration between major blockchain networks.

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Markup Scheduled for Late April** carries 72% odds on Polymarket and could unlock $4-8 billion in dedicated
signals.raw: CLARITY Act Markup Scheduled for Late April** carries 72% odds on Polymarket and could unlock $4-8 billion in dedicated XRP ETF capital if passed, formally classifying XRP as a digital commodity.[2] This regulatory clarity event is a primary market catalyst expected within days.

signals.headline: Geopolitical Catalyst** - A U
signals.raw:
Geopolitical Catalyst** - A U.S.–Iran ceasefire announcement triggered a risk-on shift across crypto markets, amplifying price rallies across Bitcoin, XRP, and Solana.[1]

## Price Movement Context

XRP led institutional inflows with $119.6 million weekly (strongest since mid-December 2025).[1] Bitcoin rose 4.87% to $71,671.90, while Solana climbed 6.65% to $84.47.[1] These movements reflect both
